description_long: This object is a heavily armored combat tactical vehicle, specifically a main battle tank, featuring a large rotating turret with a long-barreled cannon as its primary armament. The vehicle is equipped with additional cylindrical storage containers and external fuel tanks mounted on the rear, as well as multiple antennas for communication. Its hull and turret are covered in thick, sloped armor plating, with visible modular and possibly reactive panels for enhanced protection. The tank is presented in three different camouflage patterns: desert, urban, and woodland, each with distinct color schemes and irregular shapes. The tracks are robust and wide, designed for traversing rough terrain, and the vehicle lacks any visible tires. No military insignia or unit markings are visible on the exterior surfaces.
description: A heavily armored main battle tank with a large turret, long cannon, and three distinct camouflage patterns. Features include sloped armor, external storage, and wide tracks for off-road mobility.
description_view_0: Front view showing three tanks side by side, highlighting the main cannons, sloped frontal armor, and distinct camouflage patterns.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the length of the barrels, external cylindrical storage on the rear, and the full profile of the tracks.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizing the back armor, external fuel tanks, and the arrangement of the antennas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile of the tanks, with clear visibility of the turret and side armor details.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Each tank has one large cannon mounted centrally on the turret; additional mounts for machine guns or secondary weapons are not clearly visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating on the hull and turret; modular and possibly reactive panels are visible, especially on the turret sides and front.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Three camouflage patterns: tan and brown desert with irregular shapes, green and black woodland with angular patches, and a plain white scheme.
